session.user:
Run the following command and report results: uv run pytest tests/tui/commands/ -x -v
Report all test results including pass/fail counts and any error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command on the TUI commands tests.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run TUI commands tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 118 items
tests/tui/commands/test_execute_command.py ....................... [ 19%] tests/tui/commands/test_node_command_provider.py .... [ 22%] tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py .................................... [ 53%] ....................................................... [100%]
============================= 118 passed in 0.81s ==============================
session.assistant:
Success: pytest passed: 118 passed in 0.81s
All tests in the TUI commands directory passed successfully with no failures or errors.
